rationale: Control case per answer key. dim1: p=25 <=30 -> 2. dim2/dim3: control -> null (output correctly has empty mechanism_hypotheses, appropriate since p<40). dim4: evidence is specific and verifiably tied to provided data (e.g., CL3 NI=64,215,000 vs OCF=275,172,000 FY2014 and NI=78,531,000 vs OCF=421,348,000 FY2015 from 0000916540-16-000038; CL6 allowance 10,835,000->9,732,000 vs AR 409,779,000->371,392,000). Top signals form a coherent multi-year synthesis: the NI/OCF gap is reconciled against the D&A step-change (~269.9M FY2015) following the VION merger, and goodwill/asset tripling (701.6M->1,476.5M goodwill; 3.24B->5.55B assets, 2013->2014) is attributed to the merger with a post-merger stability check (~26% soft-asset share), plus correct scoping of the 2006 amendment cluster as outside the window -> 3. Consistency rule satisfied: p=25 (<40) with risk_tier=watch, no cap. memorization_suspect_condition2 false: reasoning cites concrete provided data values rather than bare document lists, and no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement/outcome facts appear (VION merger is disclosed in the in-window filings).
